_comment: SE3AF v3.6.2 — train_config_se3.json [Full SE3 production config — BUG-ES01 FIXED]
_BUG_ES01_FIX: BUG-ES01 FIXED: changed 'val_auroc' to 'auroc' — compute_metrics() returns bare keys. Previously best_model.pt never updated past epoch 1.
_C01_fix_comment: ssl_loss_weight and contrastive_loss_weight MUST remain 0.0 — graph_ssl module is empty/deleted.
_backend_comment: SE3 backend: coordinate-based message passing with Gaussian RBF on inter-atomic distances.
_af_comment: AlphaFold disabled — set alphafold_dir to your AF2 PDB directory to enable. af_extra_dim MUST be 0 when empty.
_goss_comment: GOSS cross-attention: gradient-weighted importance sampling for pair interactions.
